'''jawushu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:roadbank|roadbank]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| j-w-sh
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:roadbank|roadbank]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| jawushu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:jæwishith|jæwishith]] || [[word:jæwishij|jæwishij]] || [[word:jæwishish|jæwishish]] || [[word:jæwishi|jæwishi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:jawuwushuth|jawuwushuth]] || [[word:jawuwushuj|jawuwushuj]] || [[word:jawuwushush|jawuwushush]] || [[word:jawuwushu|jawuwushu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:jawushuth|jawushuth]] || [[word:jawushuj|jawushuj]] || [[word:jawushush|jawushush]] || [[word:jawushu|jawushu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:jawufshuth|jawufshuth]] || [[word:jawufshuj|jawufshuj]] || [[word:jawufshush|jawufshush]] || [[word:jawufshuf|jawufshuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:jawushuthu|jawushuthu]] || [[word:jawushuju|jawushuju]] || [[word:jawushushu|jawushushu]] || [[word:jawushuku|jawushuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:jawushuth|jawushuth]] || [[word:jawushuj|jawushuj]] || [[word:jawushush|jawushush]] || [[word:jawushu|jawushu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:jawushuthul|jawushuthul]] || [[word:jawushujul|jawushujul]] || [[word:jawushushul|jawushushul]] || [[word:jawushukul|jawushukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:jawushuthuthu|jawushuthuthu]] || [[word:jawushujuju|jawushujuju]] || [[word:jawushushushu|jawushushushu]] || [[word:jawushuku|jawushuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:jawushuthun|jawushuthun]] || [[word:jawushujun|jawushujun]] || [[word:jawushushun|jawushushun]] || [[word:jawushukun|jawushukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:jawushuthuoro|jawushuthuoro]] || [[word:jawushujuoro|jawushujuoro]] || [[word:jawushushuoro|jawushushuoro]] || [[word:jawushukuoro|jawushukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|7318718}}
